title: Oil gains as tensions escalate in the Middle East
section_path: Oil gains as tensions escalate in the Middle East
section_path_text: Oil gains as tensions escalate in the Middle East
summary:
Main
Optimism of stronger demand from China boosted sentiment in the metals sector. Rising geopolitical risks saw energy markets gain. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Screenshot 2024-02-19 13.11.44.png | assets/2024-02-19_oil-gains-as-tensions-escalate-in-the-middle-east_img_screenshot2024-02-19131144_a94c3fb3c0dc.png
Crude oil ended the week higher, supported by rising tensions in the Middle East.
